trigger_condition: Prompt engineering log file is locked by another process during ReadAllText
guard_snippet: try { logContent = File.ReadAllText(promptPath); } catch (IOException ex) { throw; }
potential_consequence: Unhandled IOException crashes the CLI application during startup dependency injection resolution

trigger_condition: System prompt regex matches an empty or whitespace-only code block
potential_consequence: API configuration is initialized with empty prompt constraints, breaking downstream translations

trigger_condition: Regex match takes excessive time on unstructured or maliciously formatted log content
potential_consequence: Startup thread hangs indefinitely due to catastrophic regex backtracking
NullReferenceException thrown when accessing partitions list during execution loop

trigger_condition: cancellationToken is cancelled before completing all partitions
potential_consequence: Process loop continues iterating over remaining partitions despite cancellation request

trigger_condition: llmOutput reference returned by the interrogation bridge is null
potential_consequence: Null reference added to results list, causing NullReferenceException downstream

trigger_condition: Dynamic compilation fails on later partitions after some succeeded
potential_consequence: Successfully compiled outputs from earlier partitions are lost when exception throws

trigger_condition: Deserialization library processes ColumnDefinition with missing required properties
potential_consequence: Null values bypass compiler checks and trigger NullReferenceException in logic
